If partial_policy is later set to reject, quorum wake still occurs at 6 successes but no partial batch summary is considered complete or acceptable while failures, timeout, unknown identity, and unresolved expected identity remain.

If partial_policy is later set to allow_incomplete, quorum wake may be followed by an incomplete batch summary that reports 6 succeeded, 2 failed, 1 timed_out, 1 unknown identity record, and 1 unresolved expected identity.
